description: AIIR canonical CBOR conformance vectors. Generated from the JSON test vectors by the reference Python encoder. A conforming CBOR implementation MUST produce byte-identical output for each vector.

vectors.description: Valid receipt for a human-authored commit with no AI signals
Valid receipt for an AI-assisted commit with Copilot co-author signal
Valid receipt with files_redacted=true instead of file list
Valid receipt with null repository (no git remote configured)
Valid receipt with instance_id and namespace extensions. Extensions MUST NOT affect content_hash.
Receipt with modified commit subject — content_hash and receipt_id no longer match
Receipt with wrong type field — MUST be rejected even if hash is valid
Receipt with unrecognized schema — MUST be rejected
Receipt with content_hash replaced by zeros — hash mismatch
Receipt with receipt_id replaced — ID mismatch (content_hash still valid)
Receipt with content_hash field removed. receipt_id is still valid but content_hash comparison fails.
Version field contains HTML — MUST be rejected by version format check
Valid receipt for a bot-authored commit (dependabot)
Schema field is an integer — MUST be rejected
Valid receipt with ai+bot authorship class — dual AI and bot signals from copilot[bot]
Valid receipt from MCP generator with ai_assisted authorship class
Receipt with tampered ai_attestation (flipped is_ai_authored from false to true) — hash from tv-01 no longer matches
Receipt with valid content_hash but missing receipt_id field entirely — MUST be rejected
Valid receipt where files list is capped at 100 (files_capped: true, files_changed: 150)
Valid receipt with Unicode characters in author name, subject, and file paths (ensure_ascii canonical JSON)
Valid receipt with pre-release semver version (99.0.0-alpha.1) — version format accepts pre-release suffixes
Valid receipt with extra non-core top-level key (injected_admin) — extra keys are ignored during hash computation per §6
Valid receipt with explicit empty extensions object — extensions={} does not affect core hash
Receipt with empty string version — MUST be rejected by version regex
